Login.title: Welcome back

PlacementSelection.title: Determine your level
PlacementSelection.description: Take a quick placement test to get personalized content, or self-select your level.

SelfLevelSelection.title: Select your level
SelfLevelSelection.description: Choose the level that best describes your current English proficiency.

levels.a1_desc: Can understand basic everyday phrases and simple sentences.
levels.a2_desc: Can understand simple information and communicate in routine situations.
levels.b1_desc: Can understand standard input on familiar matters and describe experiences.
levels.b2_desc: Can interact with a degree of fluency and produce clear, detailed text.
levels.c1_desc: Can understand a wide range of demanding texts and express ideas fluently.
levels.c2_desc: Can understand virtually everything heard or read and express details precisely.

PlacementResult.description: Your English is solid. You can express complex ideas fluently and you're ready to master professional nuances.

GoalSelection.title: What are you learning English for?
GoalSelection.subtitle: Choose up to 3
